nodes.label: CandidatureCard
nodes.description: Admin card component for a candidature. Implements double-bezel outer/inner shell design. Ambassadeur tier renders dark (#1A1410) background with gold (#C4973A) accents; standard tier renders cream (#EDE7DC) with red. Hover swaps profil photo for body photo. Includes tier dropdown, DispoTag (green/amber dot), TagPill (rouge/neutral/gold variants), selection dot button with ARIA, duplicate badge, and 'Nouveau' badge for registrations < 7 days old.

nodes.label: Double-bezel card pattern
nodes.description: Design pattern: outer shell (border-radius 1.1rem, padding 3px) wraps inner shell (border-radius calc - 3px) to create a layered depth effect. Outer background differs from inner background. Applied consistently to CandidatureCard, DetailPanel, and SkeletonCard.

nodes.label: Ambassadeur tier dark-gold theme
nodes.description: Tier system concept: 'ambassadeur' triggers an alternate dark aesthetic (#1A1410 background, #C4973A gold border, gradient badge, gold TagPill variant). Other tiers use the standard red/cream palette. TIER_CONFIG drives labels and colors imported from tierConfig.

nodes.label: DashboardFilters
nodes.description: Top filter bar for the admin dashboard. Contains: double-bezel search input with ⌘K hint, chip row (Tous/count, Sélect., genre, sort cycle, advanced filters trigger, archived toggle, reset). Manages FiltersDrawer open state. Sort cycles through ['date','nom','taille','age']. Drawer trigger shows count of active drawer filters. Passes all advanced filter props down to FiltersDrawer.

nodes.label: DetailPanel
nodes.description: 320px slide-in right panel showing full candidature profile. Three tabs: Infos (contact, casting profile, full-body photo, tags editor, internal notes), Mesures (body measurements table), Sessions (fetched from /api/sessions/by-model via email). Inline edit mode replaces tabs. Has delete confirmation flow, archive action, select/compose-session CTA footer. Animated via panelIn keyframe.

nodes.label: FiltersDrawer
nodes.description: Bottom slide-up drawer (position fixed, bottom 0, 80vh max, drawerUp animation, Escape key closes). Contains advanced filter sections: taille range (min/max text inputs), disponibilite chips (4 values), experience chips (3 values), tier chips (from TIER_CONFIG), dynamic tag chips (from allTags prop), ville text input, instagram checkbox. DrawerChip and DrawerInput are local sub-components.

nodes.label: Filter enum value consistency requirement
nodes.description: Critical: DISPONIBILITES = ['Flexible', 'Jours de semaine', 'Weekends', 'Voyages OK'] and EXPERIENCES = ['Débutant(e)', 'Quelques shootings', 'Expérimenté(e)'] must exactly match the values used in DetailPanel's inline edit form. Mismatch was a bug fixed in Phase 12 final review (task-10-report Fix 1).

nodes.label: FloatingBar
nodes.description: Fixed bottom bulk-selection bar (z-index 50, dark #1A1410 background). Appears via barUp spring animation when selectedCount > 0, disappears via barDown with 300ms delay. Shows up to 4 stacked thumbnails (28×36, -8px overlap), count in Cormorant Garamond, and three actions: '+ Session' (primary red CTA), '✉ Notifier' (secondary), '⎘ Copier'. Confirm-notify mode replaces actions with Confirmer/Annuler pair.

nodes.label: FloatingBar spring animation pattern
nodes.description: Spring up/down via CSS @keyframes barUp / barDown (defined in globals.css Phase 12). Visibility managed via React state with 300ms timeout on dismiss to let barDown play before removing from DOM. Uses role='status' aria-live='polite' for accessibility.

nodes.label: KpiStrip
nodes.description: Horizontal 4-cell KPI bar. Each cell has label (uppercase, muted), large Cormorant Garamond value, optional trend text (green). Accent cell gets red 2px top border, red dot before label, slightly red-tinted background, and red value color. Cells separated by border-left. Used at top of dashboard page under AdminNav.

nodes.label: SearchOverlay
nodes.description: Global search overlay (⌘K, role=dialog aria-modal). Debounced 300ms fetch to /api/search?q=. Returns two sections: 'Modèles' (candidatures) and 'Sessions'. Keyboard navigation: ArrowUp/Down move activeIdx, Enter selects, Escape closes. Selecting a candidat calls onSelectCandidat(id) and closes. Selecting a session navigates to /admin/sessions. Min 2 chars to trigger search.

nodes.label: SessionStatusPanel
nodes.description: Modal panel for tracking model confirmations within a session. Fetches /api/sessions/[id] on mount. Shows progress bar (confirmed/total), capacity indicator (red if at max_models). Manual reminder buttons: j5/j2/j1/morning/merci/paiement POST to /api/sessions/remind. Email tracking icons (delivered/clicked/bounced). Per-model payment_amount input (PATCH to /api/sessions/models/[id]). Link to /facture/[token]. Add external participant form (POST /api/sessions/participants). Embeds SessionEditPanel for session editing.

nodes.label: SkeletonCard
nodes.description: Shimmer loading placeholder matching CandidatureCard dimensions. Uses shimmer @keyframe (600px background-size sweep). Cream (#EDE7DC) base. Photo zone 110px, footer with 3 skeleton lines and 2 pill placeholders. Replaces the generic spinner during dashboard data loading (9 SkeletonCards shown in grid).

nodes.label: HeroSplit
nodes.description: Main hero section with CSS-only slideshow (5 .lum-slide divs animated via @keyframes show + kenBurns, staggered with animation-delay). JS only manages counter/dots via setInterval(5000ms). Includes fixed nav (logo F + nav links), hero section embedding CandidatureForm, and fixed photo counter (.lum-counter). Mobile: .lum-mobile-atmosphere div shows eyebrow text above form. Uses min-height 100dvh (dynamic viewport).

nodes.label: CSS-only slideshow with JS counter sync
nodes.description: Architectural decision: slideshow transitions are pure CSS (opacity animation on .lum-slide, kenBurns on wrapper div), completely independent of JS state. JS only drives the numeric counter and dot indicators. This decoupling prevents React re-renders from interrupting CSS animations and ensures smooth 5s intervals.
nodes.norm_label: css-only slideshow with js counter sync

nodes.label: PhotoSlideshow
nodes.description: Controlled photo slideshow component. Parent (HeroSplit) manages current index. Accepts current (active slide index) and onAdvance() callback. Uses ref pattern to avoid stale closure in setInterval. Ken Burns animation applied to a wrapper div surrounding next/image (GPU-safe: transform only, never on Image directly). Each slide is absolute inset-0 with opacity transition 2000ms.

nodes.label: DarkSection
nodes.description: Dark (var(--ink)) section with giant monogram 'L' watermark (65vw, opacity 0.02). Two-column grid (1fr 1fr, 8rem gap). Left: eyebrow text (var(--champagne)), h2 with red-lt em, paragraph, red CTA button. Right: numbered criteria list (5 items, stagger 0.08s via Framer Motion variants). All elements use whileInView with once:true. EASE: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] (spring-like).

nodes.label: PhotoStrip
nodes.description: 5-photo horizontal grid (repeat(5, 1fr), 2px gap, ink background). Each photo in 3:4 aspect ratio with hover scale effect (Framer Motion stagger 0.08s entry animation: opacity 0, y 24, scale 0.97 → visible). Scale hover applied to inner wrapper div, not Image. Dark overlay on hover (background transitions from rgba(0) to dark). Note: uses picsum placeholders — production should use Supabase Storage.

nodes.label: SiteFooter
nodes.description: Three-element row footer: large italic 'F' monogram (Cormorant Garamond), center nav links (Instagram external, casting@luminamodels.ca contact email), copyright '© 2026 Flawa Models'. All three animate in via Framer Motion whileInView opacity 0→1 with 0.1s staggered delay. Background var(--paper). Email: casting@luminamodels.ca.

nodes.label: Dashboard Phase 12 SDD Progress Ledger
nodes.description: Tracks completion of all 11 Phase 12 dashboard tasks (plus final fix commit). Branch: feat/dashboard-phase12, merge base f331e96, started 2026-06-29. All tasks [x]: CSS foundations, KpiStrip, SkeletonCard, AdminNav, FiltersDrawer, DashboardFilters, CandidatureCard, FloatingBar, DetailPanel, dashboard/page.tsx, visual validation. Final fix commit: 2f2d88b.

nodes.label: Task 1 Brief — CSS foundations
nodes.description: Specifies globals.css changes for Phase 12: gold color vars (--color-gold #C4973A, --color-gold-light, --color-gold-mid, --color-cream-deep #EDE7DC); :root tokens (--spring, --spring-fast, --shadow-card, --shadow-card-hover); body::before grain SVG overlay (fixed, z-index 998, opacity 0.028); @keyframes shimmer for SkeletonCard.

nodes.label: Task 1 Report — CSS foundations
nodes.description: Completion report for CSS task. Commit a0bc1a8. Added gold vars at lines 27-30, dashboard tokens at lines 129-134, grain overlay at lines 169-177. Also added all Phase 12 keyframes (shimmer, drawerUp, barUp, barDown, panelIn) at lines 350-371. 0 TypeScript errors.

nodes.label: Task 10 Brief — dashboard/page.tsx layout final
nodes.description: Specifies dashboard/page.tsx integration: replace nav with AdminNav, add KpiStrip (4 items), replace spinner with 9× SkeletonCard, contextual empty state with ghost illustration + active filter chips + reset CTA, flex row layout where grid zone shrinks to 2-col 200px when DetailPanel is open, DetailPanel inline in flex row, FloatingBar receives selectedItems prop, Ambassadeur cards get grid-row:span 2 only when panel closed.

nodes.label: Task 10 Report — dashboard/page.tsx integration
nodes.description: Completion report. Commit 605ef4b. 10 changes applied. Addendum commit 2f2d88b for 5 fixes: (1) FiltersDrawer enum match, (2) archived toggle chip, (3) grain scoped to .admin-grain::before + admin/layout.tsx wrapper, (4) FloatingBar img→next/image, (5) transition-all violations replaced with explicit property transitions.

nodes.label: Dashboard Final Brainstorm HTML
nodes.description: Static HTML prototype/reference for the Phase 12 dashboard design. Establishes visual system: --cream #F7F3EE, --cream-deep #EDE7DC, --ink #1A1410, --rouge #8B0020, --spring cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1). Grain overlay pattern (body::before, fixed, z-index 99, opacity 0.025). Device frame concept: outer (cream-deep, 1.75rem, padding 5px) + inner (cream, inset radius). Floating pill nav design.

nodes.label: API: /api/sessions/by-model
nodes.description: GET endpoint queried by DetailPanel Sessions tab. Accepts email query param. Returns { success: boolean, data: ModelSession[] }. Fetches all session participations for a model identified by email.

nodes.label: API: /api/search
nodes.description: GET endpoint used by SearchOverlay. Accepts q query param (min 2 chars). Returns { candidatures: CandidatureResult[], sessions: SessionResult[] }. Powers the ⌘K global search with 300ms debounce.

nodes.label: API: /api/sessions/[id]
nodes.description: GET and DELETE endpoint used by SessionStatusPanel. GET returns { success, data: ModelStatus[], stats: {confirmed,cancelled,pending,total}, session: {max_models} }. DELETE removes the session. Reloaded after edit in SessionEditPanel.

nodes.label: API: /api/sessions/remind
nodes.description: POST endpoint for manual reminder sends. Body: { sessionId, type: 'j5'|'j2'|'j1'|'morning'|'merci'|'paiement' }. Returns { sent: number }. Guarded against double-click via sending state in SessionStatusPanel.

nodes.label: Page: /facture/[token]
nodes.description: Printable invoice page linked from SessionStatusPanel per model (via token). Each model in a session has a unique token used to access their public invoice. Part of Phase 11 billing features.

properties.description: Floating pill nav detached from the top edge (#1A1410, height 40px, border-radius 100px). Replaces sticky full-width top nav.
properties.rationale: Floating pill detached from the edge — inspired by macOS dock aesthetic. More elegant than a full-width sticky header; leaves more breathing room for content above the fold.

properties.description: Outer shell (cream #EDE7DC or dark ink) with 3-4px padding + border-radius. Inner content div with background and border-radius calc(outer_radius - padding). Inset shadows add depth.
properties.normal_variant: outer #EDE7DC border rgba(26,20,16,.07), inner #fff shadow rgba(255,255,255,.65) inset
properties.ambassadeur_variant: outer #1A1410 border rgba(196,151,58,.3), inner #1A1410 shadow rgba(255,255,255,.06) inset
properties.rationale: Mimics physical card material depth — the outer bezel is a different material revealing an inner layer. More luxury feel than a flat card with a border. Consistent across components creates visual coherence.

nodes.label: CSS Variable Convention — Tailwind v4 --color-* prefix

properties.description: Tailwind v4 generates CSS custom properties with --color-* prefix instead of plain --*. Must use var(--color-red) not var(--red) for Tailwind theme values.
properties.fix_pattern: var(--red) → var(--color-red), var(--ink) → var(--color-ink), var(--paper) → var(--color-paper)
properties.rationale: Tailwind v4 broke the v3 naming convention. Using the wrong prefix causes variables to resolve to undefined — styles silently fail with no console error.

nodes.norm_label: css variable convention — tailwind v4 --color-* prefix

properties.description: All transition declarations must specify explicit CSS properties, never `transition: all`.
properties.correct_pattern: transition: 'background-color .3s var(--spring), color .3s var(--spring), transform .15s var(--spring)'
properties.rationale: transition:all forces the browser to compute every animatable property on every frame, including layout-triggering ones like width/height/margin. On low-end devices this causes jank. Explicit properties let the compositor skip layout recalculation.

nodes.label: Optional Props Pattern — Backward Compatibility During Incremental Refactor

properties.description: When a component gains new props that the parent caller doesn't yet pass, make them optional with defaults to keep tsc --noEmit passing. Tighten back to required in the follow-up task.
properties.example: FloatingBar.selectedItems: Candidature[] → selectedItems?: Candidature[] (default []) because page.tsx not yet updated.
properties.follow_up: Task 10 should pass selectedItems={filtered.filter(c => selectedIds.has(c.id))} and make prop required again.
properties.rationale: Incremental refactoring across multiple tasks requires each task to produce a compilable state. Optional props with defaults is the pattern to decouple component refactor from caller update.

nodes.norm_label: optional props pattern — backward compatibility during incremental refactor

nodes.label: DetailPanel — Inline Flex Panel vs Full-Screen Modal

properties.description: DetailPanel migrated from Framer Motion full-screen overlay to a 320px inline flex child with CSS panelIn animation.
properties.trade_off: Requires parent dashboard to use flex row and collapse the card grid width when panel is open — architectural dependency.
properties.rationale: 1) CSS keyframe (panelIn) is GPU-accelerated — same performance as Framer Motion. 2) Removes Framer Motion dependency from this critical path component. 3) Inline panel enables simultaneous grid+detail view (side-by-side) which is impossible with a full-screen overlay.

nodes.norm_label: detailpanel — inline flex panel vs full-screen modal

properties.description: Top-talent model tier with distinct dark ink + gold treatment across all UI components (card, badge, panel, tag pills).
properties.rationale: Ambassadeur models are top talent requiring immediate visual distinction in the grid. Dark+gold treatment is the luxury branding language consistent with Flawa Models identity — stands out from the cream/white default without looking like an alert.

properties.description: Exported object mapping Tier string keys to { label, color, bg }. Also exports Tier type union. Shared across CandidatureCard, FiltersDrawer, DashboardFilters.
properties.rationale: Single source of truth for tier labels and colors. Changing a tier display name or color requires editing one file rather than every component that renders tiers.

properties.description: CSS custom properties --spring and --spring-fast define cubic-bezier easing. Combined with keyframes for consistent springy feel.
properties.rationale: Centralizing easing curves in CSS vars ensures all animations feel physically consistent. A single change to --spring propagates everywhere without touching component files.

nodes.label: TypeScript Strict — Zero Errors Before Every Commit

properties.rule: npx tsc --noEmit must return 0 errors before any git commit. No exceptions.
properties.rationale: TypeScript strict mode catches prop mismatches, null dereferences, and missing branches at compile time — before they hit production and break the casting workflow. Enforced at every task boundary in Phase 12 SDD.

nodes.norm_label: typescript strict — zero errors before every commit

properties.rule: SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY must never be used as NEXT_PUBLIC_. Server-side only.
properties.rationale: The service_role key bypasses all Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) policies. Exposing it client-side would allow any user with browser DevTools to read/write all database rows — including private model photos and personal data.
next/image provides automatic WebP conversion, lazy loading, blur placeholder, and responsive sizes — essential for a photo-heavy casting platform where model images dominate bandwidth.
properties.documented_exception: FloatingBar thumbnails (28×36px stacked) use bare with ESLint suppression. next/image overhead (wrapper div, additional requests) is not justified for these tiny internal-tool thumbnails.

properties.project: Flawa Models (lumina-next) — international casting agency, model registration form
properties.stack: Next.js 15 App Router · TypeScript strict · Tailwind v4 · shadcn/ui · Framer Motion · Supabase · Resend · reCAPTCHA v3
properties.design_tokens: Background #F7F3EE, Rouge #8B0020, Cormorant Garamond 300 italic, Montserrat 200/300/500

properties.task: Refactor DashboardFilters: chips + sort + drawer integration
Refactor CandidatureCard: double-bezel, Ambassadeur variant, info B
Refactor FloatingBar: thumbnails + spring animation + ink layout
Refactor DetailPanel: slide-in inline panel, tabs, luxury header, sticky footer

links.rationale: history state is typed ModelSession[] | null, interface defined locally at lines 13-19.

import { TIER_CONFIG, type Tier } from '@/components/admin/tierConfig' at line 8.

Global Constraints — verifyToken used on all routes

links.rationale: isAmb flag derived from c.tier === 'ambassadeur' controls all dark-gold styling branches throughout the component.
CandidatureCard explicitly implements outer/inner shell with matching border-radius calc(1.1rem - 3px) and padding: 3px design.
task-10-brief and task-10-report confirm both are rendered in dashboard/page.tsx — KpiStrip above the cards grid.
SkeletonCard replicates CandidatureCard's outer shell dimensions (1.1rem radius, 3px padding, same shadow vars) for visual continuity during loading.
HTML prototype introduced the device-outer/device-inner pattern (padding 5px, border-radius 1.75rem, matching inset calc) that became the double-bezel card pattern.
DashboardFilters renders <FiltersDrawer> passing all advanced filter state and handlers (lines 200-214).
DashboardFilters search input shows ⌘K hint badge; SearchOverlay is the ⌘K modal. They serve complementary search modes: inline text filter vs global modal search.
DetailPanel has onComposeSession? prop and '+ Session' footer button. The parent dashboard wires this to open SessionStatusPanel or composer.
Sessions tab useEffect at line 96-104 fetches /api/sessions/by-model?email= when activeTab === 'Sessions' or when detail changes.
task-10-report Fix 1 explicitly states enum values must match DetailPanel.tsx edit form values exactly to avoid filter/data mismatch.
@keyframes panelIn added in task-1 enables DetailPanel slide-in animation.
DISPONIBILITES and EXPERIENCES constants must exactly match DetailPanel edit form values. Bug found and fixed in Phase 12 final review.
Fix 1 (enum match) and Fix 5 (transition-all removed from DrawerChip) applied to FiltersDrawer.
@keyframes drawerUp added in task-1 enables FiltersDrawer slide-up animation.
FloatingBar has onComposeSession prop (primary CTA '+ Session'). Composing a session for selected models likely opens SessionStatusPanel or a session composer which leads to it.
Fix 4: replaced raw with next/image in FloatingBar thumbnails (task-10-report addendum).
task-1-report confirms @keyframes barUp and barDown were added at globals.css lines 350-371, enabling FloatingBar's spring animation.
task-10-brief specifies exact KpiStrip items: Nouvelles/accent, Modèles actifs, Sessions (0 placeholder), Sélectionnés.
fetch(`/api/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(value)}`) at line 59 with 300ms debounce.
Selecting a session result calls router.push('/admin/sessions') at line 78 — does not open session inline, navigates to sessions page.
fetch(`/api/sessions/${sessionId}`) on mount at line 50 and after external participant add at line 355.
POST to /api/sessions/remind with { sessionId, type } at lines 157-161 for all 6 reminder types.
href={`/facture/${m.token}`} at line 279 — each model row has a link to their printable invoice.
@keyframes shimmer added in task-1 powers SkeletonCard's loading animation.
HeroSplit uses CSS-only .lum-slide @keyframes show + kenBurns for slideshow; setInterval only updates counter/dots state, not slide visibility.
PhotoSlideshow is a controlled component accepting current and onAdvance props. HeroSplit (or equivalent parent) owns the state. Comment at line 19 explicitly states this.
DarkSection ('why' section) and SiteFooter are public-facing page sections; footer logically comes after content sections.
Both use identical Framer Motion stagger pattern: container variants with staggerChildren 0.08s, EASE [0.16,1,0.3,1], whileInView once:true with -80px margin.
Code comment at line 7: 'En prod : remplacer les URLs picsum par Supabase Storage.' Current implementation uses picsum.photos seed URLs.
